title: [FIRRTL] Failure with Nightly Chisel re: layers
body:
The following circuit is currently failing to compile:

```
FIRRTL version 4.0.0
circuit Foo :
  layer A, bind :
    layer D, bind :
  module Foo :
    input port : UInt<1>

    layerblock A :
      wire a : UInt<1>
      connect a, port

      layerblock D :
        node _d_T = xor(port, a)
        wire d : UInt<1>
        connect d, _d_T
```

```
Website.fir:13:21: error: 'firrtl.strictconnect' op using value defined outside the region
        node _d_T = xor(port, a)
                    ^
Website.fir:13:21: note: see current operation: "firrtl.strictconnect"(%0#0, <<UNKNOWN SSA VALUE>>) : (!firrtl.uint<1>, !firrtl.uint<1>) -> ()
Website.fir:5:3: note: required by region isolation constraints
  module Foo :
```
